annotation_basis: Blind annotation from source O&M text only.

concept_ground_truth.label: T1
concept_ground_truth.reason: O&M step T1 retained verbatim from the source document.

concept_ground_truth.label: <named component>
concept_ground_truth.reason: Explicitly named hardware, interface, or local feature in the source document.

concept_ground_truth.label: <context field>
concept_ground_truth.reason: Context or recordkeeping field, not a stable graph concept.

relation_ground_truth.head: T1
relation_ground_truth.reason: The source procedure order places T1 before T2.

relation_ground_truth.head: <asset or assembly>
relation_ground_truth.reason: The source document presents the tail as part of the local service boundary.

workflow_relation_ground_truth.head: T1
workflow_relation_ground_truth.reason: The source step explicitly observes or acts on this object.
